calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2005 Continued To Sep-06-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye #3538
Jak Marquez, Esq. for Plaintiff: American Hotels, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness: Pete Manlolo, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Corey Drew.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 735 Taylor St., #411, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,665.00
No costs or fees.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this date as scheduled for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan Clerk: Anna Redigonda
Steven Marquez Jak, Esq. present appeared for Plaintiff
There was no appearance by Defendant Corey Drew in Pro Per
Therefore, the Court orders the settlement conference off calendar; the jury demand stricken; and the case will proceed as a Court Trial.
(Not reported)
